content.en:
It took a little time, Ye Tian collected all the ruin gold here, and then left here.

And these ruins of gold were also sent to the Xuanqi Territory by Ye Tian.

After all, even if the ruin snake copied its body, it was possible to encounter danger in the Infinite Realm Ruins, so it was safer to place it inside the ruin stone tower of the Xuanqi Realm.

......

Interior of the Ruins Stone Tower.

Ye Tian took out some of the ruin gold, and he now began to use the ruin gold to try to urge the Xuanqi armor.

I saw that he compressed a large amount of ruin gold together to form a ruin gold ball, and then placed the ruin gold ball inside the Xuanqi armor to act as an energy source.

Then, the Xuanqi armor was activated by Ye Tian!

Airplanes!!!

The Genki armor has moved, and it has really been activated!

Immediately, Ye Tian used the Dunjia Shuttle to directly take the Xuanqi Armor into the Infinite Realm Ruins, and he was going to have a discussion with the Xuanqi Armor Warrior in the Infinite Realm Ruins.

Among the immeasurable ruins.

Ye Tian and Xuanqi Jiashi were ready to fight, and he asked Xuanqi Jiashi to attack with all his strength.

Bang!!!!

The speed of both sides was extremely fast, and they collided together in an instant.

However, just Ye Tian, Xuanqi Armor's attack broke many of Ye Tian's defenses, and even the sword rays formed by the immeasurable supernatural magic mark were shattered.

Burst!

Ye Tian spit out drops of immeasurable blood from his mouth, and his body was not lightly injured.

"What a terrifying Xuanqi armor, with just one blow, I was hit hard!"

Ye Tian really realized the horror of the Xuanqi Armor, and this was just an imitation of the Infinite Realm Armor, which showed how terrifying the real Infinite Realm Armor was.

If he encounters a real Infinite Realm Armorer, I'm afraid he will be killed in seconds!

"I'm just comparable to the average fifth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms now, and the gap between me and those top fifth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms is still quite large!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Now, he has this Xuanqi armor as his hole card, and his strength has soared.

Moreover, he could also use the Xuanqi Armor as a sparring partner, thereby increasing his combat ability, and he could also let him know the gap between himself and the top fifth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms.

Subsequently, Ye Tian asked the Xuanqi armor to lower his strength to compete with him, and the two sides fought for a long time in the Infinite Realm Ruins, and then returned to the Xuanqi Realm.

Time flies.

A steady stream of ruin gold fell from the Infinite Realm Ruins to Ye Tian's hands, so that he no longer had to worry about the amount of ruin gold.

The long years passed.

After the first year of more than 300 million realms.

At this moment, Ye Tian used a massive amount of immeasurable blood gold stones to refine his body to the point where he was about to reach eight full-body refining, and once the refining was successful, his strength would skyrocket again.

this day.

He began to impact the eighth full-body refinement, taking out a large amount of immeasurable blood gold stones, and also taking out some other resources.

Again!

Twice!

Three times!

A large amount of resource energy consumption was used by Ye Tian to refine his body.

After refining his body hundreds of thousands of times, Ye Tian's body finally transformed.

Rumble!!!!

Ye Tian's body seemed to have broken some kind of shackles, and finally completely completed the eighth full-body tempering, his flesh and blood body improved wildly, and his strength made a huge leap.

It was a long time before this metamorphosis ended.

"Finally reached the eighth full-body tempering!"

Ye Tian was quite excited.

His eighth full-body tempering could far surpass the eighth full-body tempering of other Great Ancestors, even the ninth or even the tenth full-body tempering was far inferior to him.

After all, he has raised all the immeasurable bones in his body to a super-high quality, who can do it?

The other Great Ancestors even had immeasurable bones of ordinary quality, and they were not even superior extreme qualities, so they were naturally far from being comparable.

And with this breakthrough, his immeasurable blood has also undergone some changes.

"My immeasurable blood is not far from the super-grade quality, if even the immeasurable blood has stepped into the super-quality, my strength will really have an unimaginable leap, and when the time comes, it may be enough to match the Xuanqi armor!" Ye Tian said darkly.

Another period of time has passed.

On this day, the Blood Ancestor came to find Ye Tian.

......

Ruins of stone towers.

The Bloody Ancestor came, and Ye Tian entertained him.

"Endless Great Ancestor, this is the Xuanyu glazed liquid, this is a good thing, you actually used this treasure to make tea and entertain me!"

The Blood Ancestor was surprised.

Not only that, Ye Tian's other hospitality things were very precious, and the average fourth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeform was afraid that he could afford to pay one-tenth of his net worth.

And when it came to Ye Tian, it was just food for a reception.

I have to say that Ye Tian's local tyrant aura really shocked him.

"Blood Ancestor, what are you looking for me this time?"

Ye Tian asked.

"There is a good thing!" said the Raccoon Blood Ancestor mysteriously, "Have you ever heard of the Huanyu Alliance?"

"Haven't heard of it!"

Ye Tian shook his head.

He really didn't know much about the forces outside the Xuanqi Territory, and he didn't specifically inquire about it.

The Blood Ancestor introduced: "The Universal Alliance is a loose organization, similar to the Outer Alliance, but it is not as organized as the Outer Alliance, and it is far freer than the Outer Alliance. There are only many factions in the outside alliance, but the internal management is still very strict, which is similar to the real force. But the Universal Alliance is different, this force has almost no restraints, and it is relatively fair. Even if it is the strongest person in the Universal Alliance, it is impossible to order, everyone pays attention to fairness!"

"Blood Ancestor, you're not here to pull me into this Universal Alliance, are you?"

Ye Tian roughly guessed the thoughts of the Blood Ancestor, so he asked.

"Yes!" the Blood Ancestor nodded, "There are many benefits to joining the Universal Alliance. The Universal Alliance is actually a kind of force, or platform, established to break through the Heavenly Ancestor. Once you enter the Universal Alliance, a lot of information is shared, and you may be able to know where there is an opportunity. For a great ancestor like us, joining the Universal Alliance is equivalent to breaking away from the Xuanqi Realm in half a step! If we stay in the Xuanqi Realm all the time, even if there is a chance to break through and become a Heavenly Ancestor, we don't know. "

Ye Tian agreed with the Raccoon Blood Ancestor's statement, if he stayed in the Xuanqi Realm all the time, there was indeed no chance of growth.

Like the Great Ancestor of Jiuyang, who is the founder of the Jiuyang Sea, he has become a fifth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeform for I don't know how many years, and it may even be older than the Heavenly Ancestor of Taichen Palace.

But now, the Great Ancestor of Jiuyang can't even beat the Xuanqi armor, how sad!

Subsequently, Ye Tian and Raccoon Blood discussed a lot of things about the Huanyu League, and they learned more and more about the Huanyu League.

At the same time, he also knew why the Blood Ancestor had wooed him into the Universal Alliance!
